series_metadata.series_description: (A) The purpose of these files are for reference and instruction in the administration of the agency. (B) These files contain requests for various forms supplied by the Board; correspondence regarding incomplete or improperly completed forms required by the Board; requests and correspondence regarding publications of the Board; preliminary correspondence concerning licensure with the Board (e.g. - as a pharmacist, pharmacy intern, or dangerous drug distributor). (C) These files do not contain any documents of legal importance; any correspondence dealing with board action; or any correspondence dealing with violations of the drug laws of Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year from date of correspondence. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year from date of correspondence., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
